content:
# Free AI Tools for Digital Marketing in India 2026

AI tools have levelled the playing field — a solo freelancer can now produce the output of a 5-person marketing team with the right free tools.

## The Free Digital Marketing AI Toolkit

### 1. Forjit AI — Content, Copy, and Campaigns
[Forjit AI](https://www.forjitai.in) generates marketing content for any format.

**High-impact prompts:**
- "Write 10 Instagram caption variations for a [product] launch. Audience: Indian women 25–35. Tone: aspirational."
- "Write a 7-day Instagram content plan for a [business] in India."
- "Write Google Ads copy for [keyword]. 3 headlines (30 chars), 2 descriptions (90 chars)."

### 2. QR Code Generator — Bridge Online and Offline
Create QR codes for your website, WhatsApp link, or UPI payment. Our [QR Generator](/tools/qr-generator.html).

### 3. WhatsApp Link Generator — India's Most Powerful Marketing Channel
WhatsApp has 500M+ Indian users. Create click-to-chat links with pre-filled messages. Our [WhatsApp Link Generator](/tools/whatsapp-link.html).

### 4. Word Counter — Optimise Every Character
- Instagram caption: first 125 chars show before 'more'
- Google Ads headline: 30 characters
- Meta description: 155–160 characters

## SEO for Indian Small Businesses

**AI-assisted local SEO workflow:**
1. Generate location-specific landing page content
2. Create FAQ content targeting customer questions
3. Write Google Business Profile posts weekly
4. Generate responses to customer reviews

## Pricing Reality Check

- Jasper AI: ~₹4,000/month
- Copy.ai: ~₹4,000/month
- Writesonic: ~₹1,600/month
- **Forjit AI: Free, forever**
